items.title: Không nhận ra Điền Hi Vi, qua tay Gucci vòng 1 bỗng "tàng hình"
items.summary: Vietnamese entertainment outlet kenh14.vn covers Chinese actress Tian Xiwei's (Điền Hi Vi) appearance in the second chapter of Gucci's Monte Carlo campaign, in which she trades her usual soft, girlish image for sharp tailoring and smoky makeup. Reader commentary embedded in the piece is mixed: some netizens say the styling makes her hard to recognize and does not suit her, while others praise her willingness to embrace bolder fashion concepts.

items.title: Không thể nhận ra Điền Hi Vi trong chiến dịch Gucci Monte Carlo
items.summary: Harper's Bazaar Vietnam's editorial take on the same Tian Xiwei Gucci Monte Carlo campaign frames the transformation more favorably as a demonstration of versatility, contrasting with the more skeptical reader reaction reported on entertainment portals the day before.

items.title: TIMETHAI x Gucci: ELLE Men Thailand July 2026 Cover Story
items.summary: Thai musician TIMETHAI appears on ELLE Men Thailand's July 2026 cover wearing looks from the Generation Gucci collection designed by Demna. The editorial frames the shoot around the artist's move toward a more authentic personal style, distancing himself from following social trends.

items.title: Bow Maylada at Gucci Siam Paragon Generation Gucci event
items.summary: Siam Paragon's official X account posts about Thai actress Bow Maylada's appearance promoting the Generation Gucci Collection at the Gucci boutique in Siam Paragon, Bangkok, part of ongoing local ambassador activation posts (#BowxGucciSiamParagon) that have continued through late June into July.

items.title: Fan-account video of Bow Maylada at Gucci Siam Paragon
items.summary: A Thai fan account re-shares video clips of actress Bow Maylada at the Gucci Siam Paragon Generation Gucci event, part of coordinated fandom amplification typical of Thai celebrity-brand activations; content is fan enthusiasm rather than independent commentary.

items.title: 2026 Gucci Flora thread
items.summary: Active PurseForum thread where members discuss the 2026 Gucci Flora-print pieces under Demna, including the Jackie in Flora nylon and a GG Marmont in Flora silk twill; posters compare canvas versus leather versions and note the white GG Marmont sold out online, reflecting genuine collector engagement rather than brand messaging.

items.title: Unpopular Gucci Opinions thread
items.summary: Long-running PurseForum thread collecting members' contrarian views on Gucci bags and design direction; recent posts continue to weigh in on whether Demna's aesthetic overhaul improves or dilutes the house's codes, providing an unfiltered community sentiment thermometer distinct from press coverage.
